suppress.notes: Package: minimatch CVE-2026-26996 / GHSA-3ppc-4f35-3m26 - ReDoS via repeated wildcards. Fix requires minimatch >= 10.2.1 but all dependents (eslint, copy-webpack-plugin, npm-run-all, etc.) are pinned to ^3.x. Dev-only dependency, not used in production. Suppressed until fix is published/parent packages are upgraded.

Package: serialize-javascript CVE-2020-7660 / GHSA-5c6j-r48x-rmvq - RCE via RegExp.flags and Date.prototype.toISOString() Fix requires upgrade to copy-webpack-plugin which requires an upgrade to Node 20+ Dev-only dependency, not used in production. Suppressed until node upgraded

Package: immutable GHSA-wf6x-7x77-mvgw (CVSS 10.0) - Prototype pollution via setIn/updateIn. Fix requires immutable >= 4.x but browser-sync pins to ^3. No 3.x patch available. Dev-only dependency (browser-sync), not used in production
